data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for invoice sync with accounting systems.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Accounting (QuickBooks, Xero) - invoice sync', but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the need for invoice sync, there are no API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or validated. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of invoice sync functionality with QuickBooks or Xero.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
